creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #12)

> … bug-270229-gpl branch …

I renamed the branch and created pull request 169. 



(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #13)

> … add the link of https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/plain/COPYRIGHT …


Preview (from PR 169: 

<https://github.com/grahamperrin/freebsd-doc/blob/bug-270229/website/content/en/copyright/_index.adoc> 

If this looks OK, I can proceed to include translations of the page. 

Thanks, everyone.
